SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem.database

Class ProfileManager

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.database.ProfileManager
public class ProfileManager extends Object
Handles communication between local user profiles and firebase.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static ProfileManager getInstance()

    • getUserID

      public String getUserID()
      Get the user id of the signed in user
      Returns:

    • saveUser

      public void saveUser(UserProfile user, ProfileManager.OnUserAddedCallback callback)
      Saves the desired user into firebase if they do no exist already. If they already exist, updates the information. Note: the userID is the key for the document in firebase.
      Parameters:
      user - the user profile that you want to save

    • getUserProfile

      public void getUserProfile(ProfileManager.UserProfileCallBack callback)
      Get the user profile of the current signed in user
      Parameters:
      callback -

    • getAllUsers

      public void getAllUsers(ProfileManager.AllUsersCallback callback)

    • deleteUser

      public void deleteUser(String userId, ProfileManager.OnDeleteListener listener)
      Delete the user profile from firebase
      Parameters:
      userId -
      listener -

    • getUserProfileById

      public void getUserProfileById(String userId, ProfileManager.UserProfileCallBack callback)
      Get the user profile of any user by their ID. Used by systems like NotificationSystem that need to look up other users.
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user to fetch.
      callback - Returns the UserProfile, or null if not found.
